text: Norton.com/setup – If you are a subscriber to Norton's premium coverage, you will be stunned by its amazing performance and security optimization. Norton.com/setup is a great way to get started if you haven’t tried it before. It will give you at least one year of premium security. You may even start to like it. Please visit norton.com/setup Click on the link to get all you need for it: the Norton setup key, product key, or a user account.
